projects.projectDisc: amodern React game store webSite that displays acollection of video games, with some info for each one, and lets users to easly show all games, search for custom one and save game to their favorites or library useing aclean and responseve UI withe easy UX.

projects.projectDisc: afull-stack mobile app designed to enhance vehicle security by providing asmart car alarm system, the app allows users to link acar with the system and it well send an alarm to the owner and any other linked mobile, it focuses on improving car safety through asimple and responsive interface offeringquick access to security controls an notifications.

projectImgs.disc: User can find his own, and linked car and easly control them from this page.
user can add new cars, or send alink request to the owner.
Home page showing all cars linked to your account, and you can desactive/ activate alarm for any car.
notifications page show you car link requests that you can approve/ignor it and old alarms.
you can change your password, see when your plan end or when it ended
if you have no cars, you can go to add more easly.
